task_objective: Address code review regarding deprecated escape(atob(...)) decoding in HTML reports.
design_decisions: Replaced deprecated atob/escape pattern with TextDecoder and Uint8Array.from in HTML templates.
Maintained Base64 encoding on the Python side to preserve XSS protection while improving client-side robustness.
results: Successfully refactored HTML decoding logic in both templates and verified with UTF-8 stress tests and large payload tests. Full regression suite passed with 92% coverage.
